# sample-vault vault

Synthetic fixture vault for VDD deterministic-script golden tests. Two layers
(`auth` emitter, `connection` reactor) exercising the broadcast graph +
intent_refs closure. Do not edit casually — golden output is pinned to this
content.

## Layer index

### Feature layers
- [[auth]] — session lifecycle, emits auth signals
- [[connection]] — socket transport, reacts to auth signals

- [[auth/_state-contract]] — auth signal emitter
